faq.question: Jam operasional
faq.answer: Redbox buka setiap hari Senin–Minggu jam 10.00–21.00 WIB ✂️

faq.question: Lokasi dan cabang
faq.answer:
Redbox ada di 5 lokasi kak:
• 📍 Bypass — Jl. Ahmad Yani No.88 (pusat)
• 📍 Samadikun
• 📍 CSB Mall (Lt. 1)
• 📍 Sumber
• 📍 Tegal

Detail map + booking online: redboxbarbershop.com 😊

faq.question: Cara booking
faq.answer:
Booking online langsung di sini kak:

→ redboxbarbershop.com/booking.html

Tinggal pilih cabang → kapster → jam. Slot langsung terkunci, gak perlu konfirmasi ulang ✂️

faq.question: Slot dan antrian
faq.answer:
Buat liat slot real-time, paling akurat langsung di sini kak:

→ redboxbarbershop.com/booking.html

Pilih cabang yang kakak mau, jam available langsung kelihatan live 👌

faq.question: Parkir
faq.answer: Tersedia parkir gratis di depan outlet kak 🚗🏍️

faq.question: Metode pembayaran
faq.answer:
Redbox terima:
💵 Tunai (cash)
📱 QRIS — semua e-wallet & m-banking

Gampang dan cashless ✨

faq.question: Walk-in
faq.answer: Bisa langsung datang kak! Tapi mending book dulu di redboxbarbershop.com/booking.html — slot kakak langsung terkunci dan gak perlu antri 😊

faq.question: Membership
faq.answer: Ada program member Redbox kak! Dapet poin tiap transaksi, bisa ditukar diskon. Daftar di: redboxbarbershop.com/membership.html 🔥

faq.question: Home service
faq.answer: Ada layanan home service kak! Untuk detail dan booking: redboxbarbershop.com/home-service.html 😊

faq.question: Booking 2 orang / bareng
faq.answer:
Bisa banget kak — sekarang udah ada mode 2 orang, 1x checkout aja 🔥

→ redboxbarbershop.com/booking.html

Di Step 1 pilih chip '2 orang', terus pilih service & kapster masing-masing (sistem cegah kapster sama biar paralel), jam yang sama. Buat 3 orang ke atas, pilih chip '3+ orang' — banner WA muncul biar koordinasi langsung sama tim 😄

faq.question: Add-on Gentleman Grooming
faq.answer:
Pas kakak pilih Gentleman Grooming di booking page, popup add-on opsional otomatis muncul ✨

• Hair Spa (+Rp 110rb / +30 mnt)
• Shaving (+Rp 40rb / +20 mnt)
• Men Massage (+Rp 145rb / +45 mnt)

Boleh skip, boleh pilih 1 atau lebih — total harga & durasi auto-update. Cek: redboxbarbershop.com/booking.html

faq.question: Reward ulasan positif
faq.answer:
Kasih ulasan positif (rating ⭐ 4–5 di Google) → langsung dapat 5 poin RedBox senilai Rp 50.000 🎁

Link reviewnya kita auto-kirim 30 menit habis service. Tinggal tap, kasih bintang, voucher Rp 50rb otomatis masuk ke akun member kakak — bisa ditukar diskon haircut, free coffee, sampai treatment gratis ✨

Detail tier reward: redboxbarbershop.com/membership.html

faq.question: Cara dapat poin / reward
faq.answer:
Banyak cara dapet poin di RedBox kak 🔥

1️⃣ Setiap kunjungan auto-dapet poin (login member dulu di booking)
2️⃣ Ulasan positif Google rating 4–5 ⭐ → 5 poin = Rp 50.000 langsung 🎁
3️⃣ Referral teman, ulang tahun, dst — cek tier lengkap di redboxbarbershop.com/membership.html

Poin bisa ditukar diskon, free coffee, sampai Gentleman Grooming gratis ✂️
